docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP. 116.850 - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOI, SUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $860.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2000 FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY. THE COURT ALLOCATES 40% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO THE NAMED DEFENDANT ANDAM. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO CHRISTOPHER ANDAM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CHOI, SUNG AS TO DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
